title: Faster Leaves
description: Makes all leaves opaque, even when using shaders and some mods.
body:
Makes all leaves opaque, even when using shaders and some mods.

Enjoy better performance and cleaner light beams with this pack that enhances vanilla's Fast Leaves setting.

This pack currently includes support for [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit) and [End's Phantasm](https://modrinth.com/mod/ends-phantasm).

[MoreCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)'s Fast setting can be used to avoid bugs with coconut trees from Nature's Spirit.
